name: GraphPad Prism
description: GraphPad Prism is a useful analysis surface inside Biology.
whyUseIt: People in Biology use GraphPad Prism to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using GraphPad Prism as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from GraphPad Prism.
